title: Monsoon Moist Venezuelan Corn Tagine
description: A yeasty, pillowy Venezuelan dish featuring Marsala wine and render fat, cooked in a tagine pot to perfection. This lacto-vegetarian friendly recipe is sure to delight.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Combine corn kernels, Marsala wine, render fat, yeast, sugar, onion, garlic, vegetable broth, salt, and black pepper in the tagine pot.
Cover the tagine pot with a lid and bake for 30 minutes.
Remove the lid and continue baking for an additional 20 minutes, or until the corn is tender and the liquid has been absorbed.
Remove the tagine pot from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes.
Serve the Monsoon Moist Venezuelan Corn Tagine hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
Refrigerate or freeze any leftovers for later use.
Reheat the tagine in the oven or on the stovetop until warmed through.
